name: slang.gr as a Large-Scale Crowdsourced Resource for Non-Standard Greek

description: arXiv:2607.21255v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Slang is a central component of everyday language, reflecting linguistic creativity, social identity, and cultural change, yet its dy- namic and non-standard nature makes it difficult to model computationally. We present the first large-scale computational study of slang.gr, a crowdsourced lexicon of Greek non-standard language, combining lexica...
author: Panagiotis Papadakos, Katerina Papantoniou, Dimitris Plexousakis
